heading_content_part: Privacy PolicyPrivacy PolicyThis privacy policy applies to the following apps by keuwlsoft:Bluetooth ElectronicsThis app uses the (android.permission.BLUETOOTH and BLUETOOTH_ADMIN)

permissions in order to use the Bluetooth     functionality of your device.In order to discover bluetooth devices in newer versions     of Android, the ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION permission is required.In order to be able to save and load your panels the WRITE_EXTERNAL_STORA

GE permission is required.This app also uses the internet (android.permission.INTERNET) permission so that we can serve ads and generate a little revenue.This app uses the (android.permission.BLUETOOTH and BLUETOOTH_ADMIN)    permissions in order to use the Bluetooth functionality of your device.In order to discover bluetooth devices, the ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION permission is required.

This app also uses the internet (android.permission.INTERNET) permission so that we can serve ads and generate a little revenue.In order to deliver the ads, we use the AdMob SDK from Google.    Please see their terms andprivacy policyfor information on any data they might collect or share.    Also seehttps://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sitesfor a good explanation of how Google uses information from Apps.

Personalised ads may or may not be served, depending on your region.  With regards to GDPR, if consenting to personalised ads in the EEU/UK,       AdMob has been configured to source the ads from Google, or one of these Google-certified ad networks, each partner having their own privacy policies:InMobiChartboostironSource MobileFacebookVungleAd ColonyOtherwise, AdMob will serve ads from any of the Google-certified ad networks.
Whilst keuwlsoft does not directly collect or store any of your personal or non-personal information,     some
anonymous analytical data (e.g. app usage and ad effectiveness data) is available to us through AdMob.Note that for an older version of this app, we used an SDK from
Appbrain,      please see their terms and privacy policy for information on any data they might collect or share.Appbrain privacy policy link
